Diagnosis Report
----------------

3 issues detected

CRITICAL Pod/prod/payments-api -> Missing Secret dependency detected
  Root cause: Pod failing because secret db-password does not exist
WARNING Pod/prod/payments-api -> NetworkPolicy blocking traffic
  Root cause: NetworkPolicy rules deny expected ingress/egress for selected pods
WARNING Service/prod/payments -> Service selector mismatch detected
  Root cause: Service selector does not match any pod labels

Dependency Traces:
  Pod/prod/payments-api -> Secret/prod/db-password -> Secret missing (source: pod.dependencies)
